title: Subtract within 100 using place value blocks
description: Practice subtracting 2-digit numbers using place value blocks.
topic_path: Get ready for addition and subtraction
Subtract within 100 using place value blocks

assessment_items.question_content:
**Subtract.**  
*Hint: Use the place value blocks to help solve $42 - 30$.*

 [[☃ numeric-input 2]] ${}\Large=\blueE{42} - \maroonD{30}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6948ed4148ef8a5063c598b276e6272433a003c0)
hints: Let's use the place value blocks to help us solve.

The first set of blocks has $\blueE{42}$ place value blocks. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c33f0b8ae658719ce9330af7126911a90723be88)

The second set of blocks has $\maroonD{30}$ place value blocks. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/98da8f8f6696e9c13821f80102a8b934ad145bf3)

Let's take away $\maroonD{30}$ place value blocks from the $\blueE{42}$ blocks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5f928d02f547edc097da13d37b0d7eb03ab6c84d)

There are $\blueE{12}$ blocks left.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/653e1e60d50d5cc42aec2d3e1daa8daf03494aff)
${}\Large\blueE{12}=\blueE{42} - \maroonD{30}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation can be represented from the place value blocks below?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4bbcea6aac8b917df4c3bdc2c5068e72c46cde55)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The first set of blocks shows $\blueE2$ tens and $\blueE9$ ones. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0c3d1a7efabad020081cf36100f01d2d00fc535d)

There are $\blueE{29}$ blocks.

The second set of blocks shows $\maroonD1$ ten and $\maroonD{6}$ ones. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e8d5ea81eb7be49ff8894cdad510d8ae1297be2b)

So, we are subtracting $\maroonD{16}$ blocks.

When we subtract $\blueE{29}-\maroonD{16}$, the difference is $\blueE{13}$ blocks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/21b8da0e18c3c3c036fda89e867540200e626417)

This equation represents the place value blocks:

$29 - 16 = 13$
